feature.name: YAML front matter round-trip
feature.description: Extract parse/load/dump of markdown with YAML front matter, preserving body text and metadata across round-trip without importing frontmatter.
included_behaviors: parse and loads YAML front matter delimited by --- lines
dump and dumps serialize Post metadata and markdown body
detect delimiter lines with optional trailing whitespace
normalize CRLF input and merge parse defaults
Post dict-like metadata access and to_dict export
excluded_behaviors: CLI, Sphinx docs, examples, and upstream test suite

entanglement.description: Front matter parsing couples handler boundary regexes, YAML load/export, unicode normalization, and Post metadata/content coupling.
signals: parse merges defaults before handler metadata
dumps respects handler and custom delimiters

output.import: import featurelifted; from featurelifted import Post, parse, load, loads, dump, dumps, checks
